hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, os
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
fp = data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','')
if 'hatake_v24.html' not in fp:
    sys.exit(0)
size = os.path.getsize(fp)
lines = sum(1 for _ in open(fp))
kb = size // 1024
if size > 300000 or lines > 2000:
    print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': f'⚠️ hatake_v24.html が大きくなっています（{kb} KB / {lines}行）— Claudeに直接貼ると限界を超える可能性があります'}))
"
